policy_yaml:
version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT = exec "**"

  rule use-cargo-build:
    notify exec "make" "build" if AGENT
    notify exec "make" "release" if AGENT
    notify exec "nix" "build" if AGENT
    notify exec "nix-build" if AGENT
    notify exec "rustc" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "**/cargo"
    because "Use cargo build for project builds."

  rule use-cargo-run:
    notify exec "make" "run" if AGENT
    notify exec "**/target/debug/llmfit" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "**/cargo"
    notify exec "**/target/release/llmfit" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "**/cargo"
    notify exec "**/target/debug/llmfit-desktop" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "**/cargo"
    notify exec "**/target/release/llmfit-desktop" if AGENT unless lineage-includes exec "**/cargo"
    because "Use cargo run to run this project."
